title: Principal Product Manager
description_excerpt: WHO WE ARE:For enterprises struggling to secure cloud workloads, Aviatrix® offers a single solution for pervasive cloud security. Where current cybersecurity approaches focus on securing entry points to a trusted space, Aviatrix Cloud Native Security Fabric (CNSF) delivers runtime security and enforcement within the cloud application infrastructure itself – closing gaps between existing solutions and helping organizations regain visibility and control. Aviatrix ensures security, cloud, and networking teams are empowering developer velocity, AI, serverless, and what’s next. For more information, visit aviatrix.aiABOUT THE ROLE: Principal Product ManagerAs a Principal Product Manager at Aviatrix, you will serve as a recognized subject matter expert and thought leader, owning the strategy and long-term vision for a set of interrelated features and solution areas within our multi-cloud networking platform. You will drive significant initiatives that shape product value and market differentiation, influencing the product roadmap at the leadership level.Working closely with engineering, marketing, sales, and customers, you will identify emerging opportunities, make high-stakes prioritization decisions, and lead cross-functional collaboration that defines Aviatrix's competitive position across AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and beyond.KEY RESPONSIBILITIESOwn and drive the long-term vision and comprehensive strategy for a set of interrelated features and solution areas, aligning them to the product's strategic goals, market position, and overall company vision.Influence the product roadmap at the leadership level by identifying future opportunities based on emerging industry trends, evolving user needs, and the competitive landscape.Engage regularly with enterprise customers, many of whom are based in the U.S., participating in product discussions, roadmap reviews, and strategic sessions; flexibility to schedule and attend meetings across time zones is expected.Establish prioritization frameworks for interdependent features that are adopted across product teams, and communicate rationale clearly to executive stakeholders.Make critical, high-stakes decisions on feature scope and strategic direction, balancing cross-functional input, market insights, and risk assessment to drive outcomes that impact the broader Product Management function.Lead execution across multiple interrelated features, overseeing project roadmaps, assigning responsibilities across teams, and establishing standards for quality delivery.Anticipate execution risks and adapt plans proactively based on resource or market changes, ensuring smooth cross-functional collaboration.Maintain deep customer focus by synthesizing feedback and real-world enterprise challenges into strategic product decisions, ensuring Aviatrix solutions address critical pain points at scale.Conduct competitive analysis and market research to keep Aviatrix at the forefront of enterprise cloud networking and security.Drive
why_fit: Cloud Native Security Fabric, multi-cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP), developer velocity — direct overlap with Wayfair platform work
Principal IC track suits both PM-leader and hands-on architect framing in the resume
why_not: Cloud security/networking specialism is a stretch for AI/ML platform background; need to lead with developer platform / governance angle.

title: Head of Product (B2B SaaS)
description_excerpt: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Product (B2B SaaS) in India.This role is a high-impact leadership position focused on shaping and scaling a product suite powering influencer-led growth and performance marketing infrastructure. You will own end-to-end product strategy, execution, and delivery across multiple product lines, with a strong initial focus on building and scaling a core flagship product. The environment is fast-paced, highly iterative, and deeply customer-driven, requiring strong product instincts and the ability to operate in ambiguity. You will work closely with engineering, design, and leadership teams to translate customer insights into scalable product solutions. The role blends strategic thinking with hands-on execution, from roadmap ownership to sprint planning and product delivery. You will also play a key role in defining product metrics, improving user experience, and ensuring consistent shipping velocity. This is a leadership opportunity to build category-defining SaaS infrastructure in a rapidly evolving market.AccountabilitiesOwn the end-to-end product vision, roadmap, and execution across multiple B2B SaaS product lines, ensuring alignment with company strategy and customer needs.Lead customer discovery efforts, including interviews, user research, beta testing, and ongoing feedback loops to deeply understand user pain points and churn drivers.Drive product prioritisation, trade-offs, and sprint planning in close collaboration with engineering and design teams.Own the development and scaling of a core product (initial focus area), ensuring strong execution from concept to delivery.Define product requirements, write detailed specs, and ensure high-quality execution across design, engineering, and UX.Build, track, and optimise key product metrics such as activation, retention, engagement, and usage.Monitor market trends, competitive landscape, and ecosystem shifts (DTC, Shopify, affiliate marketing, influencer growth) to inform product strategy.Ensure high standards of user experience, design consistency, and product usability across all releases.Lead and mentor product and design teams, fostering a culture of ownership, speed, and quality.Collaborate closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to align product direction with business objectives.Requirements8+ years of product management experience, ideally in B2B SaaS environments.Proven experience building products from 0→1, with strong execution and scaling capabilities.Strong product judgment with the ability to make clear prioritisation and trade-off decisions.Deep customer-first mindset with strong user research and discovery skills.Strong design sensibility with attention to UX, usability, and product quality.Experience working in fast-paced, high-ambiguity environments requiring ownership and autonomy.Familiarity with DTC, Shopify, influencer marketing, or affiliate ecosystems is highl
bump_reasons: +8 PayTM B2B Payments founding PM (0-to-1 fintech) + IndiaMART Big Brands subscriptions (₹30 Cr ARR) → B2B SaaS adjacency
why_fit: Head of Product matches Abhillash's leadership target
B2B SaaS infrastructure for influencer/performance marketing — adjacent to PayTM B2B Marketplace + IndiaMART subscriptions
Multi-product-line ownership matches CTL Personalization Platform breadth
why_not: Recruiter-staffed (Jobgether posts on behalf of partner) — final employer unknown. Influencer marketing domain is consumer-tech adjacent but not core fit.

title: Principal Product Manager
description_excerpt: About the Company:At Playlist, life's richest moments happen when people step away from screens to move, connect, explore, and play. We're building the definitive platform for intentional living, connecting people with inspiring experiences in fitness, wellness, and beyond. With popular brands like Mindbody and ClassPass, Playlist empowers businesses and individuals, making it effortless for aspirations to become actions. Join us in reshaping technology's role to foster meaningful, real-world connections.The Role You’ll Play:At the intersection of technology and global wellness, you’ll lead our international payments expansion. This role is about more than integrations and regulations—it’s about creating seamless, compliant experiences that empower businesses to grow and thrive across borders. Define and lead our global payments expansion strategy, aligning PSP integrations, market priorities, and compliance milestones Launch local payment methods and regional PSPs across key markets, owning the process from evaluation to go-live Build expertise in complex regulatory frameworks (like PSD2, Verifactu, NF525, and e-Invoicing), ensuring we stay ahead of local requirements Partner with Engineering to shape the global payments stack, from multi-PSP orchestration to routing logic and risk controls Collaborate with Compliance, Finance, and GTM teams to streamline reconciliation, settlement, and cross-border payouts Set success metrics for payment acceptance, reliability, and cost efficiency across markets Represent Payments in global initiatives, championing international enablement across product and platform teams Stay plugged into global payments trends, using competitive insights to inform product direction and decision-making____________________________________________________________________________________Experience You Bring: 8–10+ years of product management experience, with deep focus in global or cross-border payments Proven track record of integrating PSPs and enabling local payment methods across multiple regions Strong technical fluency—you speak API, understand payment flows, and can collaborate closely with Engineering Deep knowledge of authorization, settlement, and reconciliation processes, plus a solid grasp of merchant/PSP dynamics Familiarity with compliance frameworks like PCI-DSS, PSD2, and regional invoicing mandates Strategic mindset with a sharp eye for data—you're comfortable defining metrics and making decisions based on insight Exceptional communication and collaboration skills across Product, Engineering, Compliance, and Finance teams Bonus: Experience with B2B SaaS or platform-based paymentsHave we piqued your curiosity?Sound like the role for you? We’d love to hear from you! Even if you’re not 100% sure about potential fit, we still encourage you to apply. We’re looking for the right person, not the perfect series of checkboxes.The Company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We highly value diversity at our company and enco
bump_reasons: +8 PayTM B2B Payments founding PM + Amazon's 20+ marketplaces internationalization → cross-border payments adjacency
why_fit: Global cross-border payments, PSP integrations, PSD2/regulatory — direct overlap with PayTM B2B Payments founding PM (0-to-1 Fintech launch)
Mumbai location, technical fluency required (APIs, payment flows)
why_not: Specific cross-border PSD2/Verifactu/NF525 compliance is region-specific (EU); Abhillash's payments expertise is India-centric (PayTM).

title: Principal Product Manager
description_excerpt: Principal Product Manager - MediaSabre’s media technology platform powers the marketing campaigns that travel suppliers purchase across Sabre’s proprietary channels. With our industry‑leading Air, Lodging, Ground, and Sea businesses, along with a strong partner ecosystem, we see a significant opportunity to scale the media business over the next two years and expand our channel reach.The Media Product team works closely with customers, commercial teams, technology partners, and internal product and engineering teams. We emphasize collaboration, data‑driven decision making, and rapid learning to solve real business problems. The successful candidate will balance strategic thinking with hands‑on execution, communicate complex concepts clearly, operate with high autonomy, and influence outcomes across teams and senior stakeholders.ResponsibilitiesOwn and evolve the product vision and roadmap to support Sabre’s strategic, commercial, and growth goals for the media technology platformOwn the end‑to‑end media product lifecycle, including inventory strategy, monetization, measurement, and optimization of customer outcomesPartner with Sabre’s Media Commercial team to align product capabilities, go‑to‑market readiness, and customer demandTranslate product vision into clear requirements and user stories to enable strong engineering collaboration and value deliveryCollaborate with Product teams across Agent, Airline, and Corporate channels to enable media display, attribution, and conversion trackingSupport Sales and Account leaders in customer engagements by developing product narratives, collateral, and demos, while incorporating customer feedback into the roadmapDefine, track, and communicate customer and commercial value through dashboards, insights, and customer‑facing reportingRequirementsProven experience in Product Management, product development, and/or product deliveryExperience with digital media, advertising, sponsored content, or monetization platforms is strongly preferredStrong presentation and communication skills, with the ability to simplify complex concepts for diverse audiencesDemonstrated success in stakeholder management, including influencing senior leadership and cross‑functional teamsExperience delivering complex products in ambiguous environments with multiple dependenciesStrong track record of data‑driven decision making, including defining success metrics and evaluating trade‑offsAbility to build and sustain trusted relationships with internal teams, customers, and external partnersPassion for media, advertising technology, and the platforms that power them
bump_reasons: +10 Amazon Promotions Platform (20+ marketplaces, $4B GMV, $1.2B annualised growth) → ad/media monetization adjacency
why_fit: Media monetization platform — adjacent to Amazon Promotions Platform ($4B GMV)
why_not: Travel-supplier media advertising is a niche; Abhillash's Promotions experience is retail/CPG-flavored.
